The '''blood tree''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] that was native to the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Batorine]]. Along with their characteristic [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Wood/Legends|wood]], they were famous and widely known for being the material from which [[Blood Carver]] sculptures were crafted.

{{Species-stub}}
